name: Fastenal
analysis: FAST has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 7% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $46.5600, stop $42.8274, target $57.7578 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
